description: Implement the Execution Audit Log core model and service. This creates the data layer that records every AI-proposed command execution including: natural language intent, proposed command, risk level, approval timestamp, target server, stdout/stderr result, and execution duration. Stored in encrypted local storage via FlutterSecureStorage following the same pattern as VaultAccessLog.
steps: Create lib/core/audit/execution_audit_entry.dart - Immutable model class with fields: id (String), naturalLanguageIntent (String), proposedCommand (String), riskLevel (CommandRiskLevel from command_risk_assessor.dart), approvedAt (DateTime), serverId (String), serverName (String), stdout (String?), stderr (String?), executionDurationMs (int?), status (enum: approved/executed/failed), approvedBy (String, default 'local_user'). Include toJson() and fromJson() factory. Import CommandRiskLevel from '../ai/command_risk_assessor.dart'.

Create lib/core/audit/execution_audit_service.dart - Service class following VaultAccessLog pattern: uses FlutterSecureStorage, stores entries as JSON list under key 'execution_audit_log', with max 1000 entries (trimmed oldest-first). Methods: logExecution(ExecutionAuditEntry) -> Future<void>, loadAll() -> Future<List<ExecutionAuditEntry>>, loadByServer(String serverId) -> Future<List<ExecutionAuditEntry>>, search(String query) -> Future<List<ExecutionAuditEntry>> (searches command and intent text), deleteEntry(String id) -> Future<void>, clearAll() -> Future<void>, recentEntries({int limit = 50}) -> Future<List<ExecutionAuditEntry>>.

Create test/execution_audit_service_test.dart - Unit tests following vault_access_log_test.dart pattern. Use FlutterSecureStorage.setMockInitialValues({}) in setUp. Test: logging an entry and retrieving it, loadAll returns entries in reverse chronological order, loadByServer filters correctly, search finds entries by command text and intent text, trimming at 1000 entries works, deleteEntry removes specific entry, clearAll empties the log.
acceptance_criteria: ExecutionAuditEntry model has all required fields and serializes/deserializes correctly via toJson/fromJson
ExecutionAuditService stores and retrieves entries using FlutterSecureStorage
Entries are stored newest-first and trimmed to 1000 max
Search works across both naturalLanguageIntent and proposedCommand fields
Test file covers all service methods with meaningful assertions
verification: Run 'dart analyze lib/core/audit/' to verify no static analysis errors (or grep-based syntax check if dart unavailable)
Verify test file imports match actual class paths
Verify model toJson/fromJson round-trip is tested
findings: No Flutter/Dart SDK available so build/test commands were not run. Code was validated by checking import paths, pattern matching against vault_access_log.dart reference, and verifying package name consistency. All three files created successfully: model, service, and tests.
